programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: After settling in Green Hills, Sonic is eager to prove that he has what it takes to be a true hero. His test comes when Dr. Robotnik returns with a new partner, Knuckles, in search of a mystical emerald that has the power to destroy civilizations. Sonic teams up with his own sidekick, Tails, and together they embark on a globe-trotting journey to find the emerald before it falls into the wrong han

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Best friends Griff and Doug have always dreamed of remaking their all-time favorite movie "Anaconda." When a midlife crisis pushes them to finally go for it, they assemble a crew and head deep into the jungles of the Amazon to start filming. However, life soon imitates art when a monstrous anaconda with a thirst for blood starts hunting them down one by one.

programme.title: Anatomy of a Fall
programme.desc: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

programme.title: Whistle
programme.desc: Terror strikes when a group of misfit high-school students discovers an ancient death whistle.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: As questions of authenticity, control, and feminism arise in the '90s, Sheryl Crow, Missy Elliott, Courtney Love, Tori Amos, and Alanis Morissette make music on their own terms.

programme.title: Deadly Deed: A Fixer Upper Mystery
programme.desc: Shannon Hughes has taken on a charity project renovating a grand old Victorian mansion. When a local banker is found murdered inside, Shannon must dust off the clues and cement the truth before her renovation becomes a demolition.

programme.title: Reality Bites: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over "The Cookie Jar." When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court.

programme.title: Triumph: Rock & Roll Machine
programme.desc: The story of underdog Canadian rock band Triumph, which rose to stardom in the 1970s and '80s only to disappear at the height of its fame.

programme.title: 80 for Brady
programme.desc: Four best friends live life to the fullest when they embark on a wild trip to see their hero, Tom Brady, play in the 2017 Super Bowl.

programme.title: The Manny
programme.desc: Morgan stalks his way into the lives of busy social media influencer Lani and her son, Jaylen, to become their male nanny; as Morgan shows himself to be someone who is too good to be true, he meddles with Lani and Jaylen's lives.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: Pop superstar Kat Valdez is about to get married before an audience of her loyal fans. However, seconds before the ceremony, she learns about her fiancé's cheating ways and has a meltdown on stage. In a moment of inspired insanity, Kat locks eyes with a total stranger in the crowd and marries him on the spot. programme.title: The Dark Knight

But when a young criminal calling himself the Joker suddenly throws the town into chaos, the caped crusader begins to tread a fine line between heroism and vigilantism.
